summary: Iteration 49 - External WAN Monitor feature testing complete. All 10 features verified working: Backend APIs (CRUD targets, status, probe-now, history), TV Dashboard WAN integration, Frontend /wan-monitor page with target management UI, sidebar navigation. Both existing WAN targets (Zyxel USG FLEX 200 firewall @ 8.8.8.8 and Router Vodafone Station @ 1.1.1.1) show ONLINE status via TCP port checks.

minor.issue: Origin verification blocks browser requests from preview cluster subdomain (https://snmp-monitor-staging.cluster-12.preview.emergentcf.cloud). API works correctly via direct curl. This is a pre-existing security middleware issue, not specific to WAN monitor feature.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Errore' toast due to origin verification middleware blocking browser requests. The API itself works correctly - this is a CORS/origin security middleware issue affecting all POST requests from certain preview subdomains.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/external-monitor/targets - returns list of WAN targets (2 existing)
POST /api/external-monitor/targets - creates new target with validation
DELETE /api/external-monitor/targets/{id} - removes target and probe results
GET /api/external-monitor/status - returns probe results and diagnoses
POST /api/external-monitor/probe-now - triggers immediate probe (works via API)
tv_dashboard_integration: GET /api/tv/dashboard includes wan_diagnosis and wan_diagnosis_text per client
TV Dashboard shows 'CONNETTIVITA' WAN' section in client tiles
WAN targets show status (online/offline), device type (FW/RT), IP, latency
frontend_wan_monitor_page: Targets grouped by client with diagnosis header
Each target shows: label, status badge, IP, device type, latency, loss, port status
'Aggiungi Target' button opens form with all required fields
Form has: client selector, type (firewall/router), label, IP, ports inputs
Delete button present for each target
sidebar_navigation: 'Monitor WAN' link present in sidebar under 'Monitoraggio' group
Globe icon displayed for Monitor WAN nav item

action_items: OPTIONAL: Review origin verification middleware to allow preview cluster subdomains for POST requests (affects Probe Now button in browser)
critical_code_review_comments: WAN probe system correctly handles ICMP ping failure (common in containers) by using TCP port checks as fallback
Diagnosis engine properly determines status based on both ping and TCP reachability
Background probe scheduler runs every 60 seconds with proper semaphore for concurrent probes
Alert generation on status change works correctly with auto-resolve on recovery
TV Dashboard enrichment with WAN data is well-integrated

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All UI features work, Probe Now button blocked by origin middleware (not feature-specific)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Temporary_Target during testing (cleanup complete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified External WAN Monitor feature. 2 existing targets: Zyxel USG FLEX 200 (firewall, 8.8.8.8:443,500) and Router Vodafone Station (router, 1.1.1.1:443). Both show ONLINE status via TCP checks. ICMP ping returns 100% loss in container environment but TCP works. Diagnosis shows 'ok' when any device is reachable. TV Dashboard at /tv shows WAN section per client. Frontend /wan-monitor has full management UI. Origin verification middleware blocks some browser POST requests from preview subdomains - this is a pre-existing security feature, not a bug in WAN monitor.
